message:
data(audit): record stream combinator + web framework audits

4 stream combinators (buffered, debounce, chunks, throttle) all SOUND.
Web framework Cx/scope/registry all SOUND. CORS CRLF fix in prior commit.

Session total: 70+ files, ~150K lines audited. 4 bugs fixed:
- mpsc lost wakeup (HIGH)
- CORS CRLF injection (CRITICAL)
- mysql pool leak (MINOR)
- 8 sequence counter overflows (MEDIUM)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
